Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Pursuant To Non-Suit Of Subpoena Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TERRI KNIGHT's Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Non-Suit Of Subpoena Duces Tecum will be heard at 9:00 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Terri Knight'S Mtn To Dismiss Pursuant To Non-Suit Of Subpoena Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terri Knight, Tel. 415.585.5961, defendant and moving party, appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The party stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The defendant informed the court she had attempted telephonic notice to plaintiff's counsel. The matter was argued. After oral argument, the Court adopted its tentative rulng. DEFENDANT TERRI KNIGHT's Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Non-Suit Of Subpoena Duces Tecum is DENIED. Defendant has filed an answer to the complaint. Defendant cites a Harvard Law Review article written in 1897 to support her request for a motion to dismiss, but cites no California statute or binding case precedent that would support her motion to dismiss. The court, having found none, DENIES Defendant's motion. Order drafted by the Court and signed. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
